top_signals.title: AI-Fueled Rally Puts S&P 500 on Track for Eighth Weekly Gain
top_signals.summary: US equity futures rose as investors struck an upbeat tone ahead of a long holiday weekend, with optimism fueled by hopes for resolution of hostilities in the Middle East, resilient economic data and relentless enthusiasm for artificial intelligence-linked trades.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OKX and ICE are bringing 'never-expiring' oil futures to 120 million crypto users
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
